title: Multilingual org/funder labels via Wikidata
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). Multilingual organization/funder labels are attached from Wikidata (CC0), display-only, with provenance.
objective: Attach multilingual organization/funder labels sourced from Wikidata (CC0) to records, with provenance and no ranking/interpretation.
acceptanceCriteria: Multilingual organization/funder labels sourced from Wikidata (CC0) and attached to records.
Labels carry provenance (Wikidata IDs + retrievedAt); only CC0 labels used.
output: data/i18n-labels/ multilingual label records, committed via PR.
